name: CM_PROGRESS_SPINNER
description: Loading spinner widget with rotating 50-frame animation (blue spinner, 62x62px). Optional description text below spinner (25px). Spinner positioned at top-center area, label below. Continuous rotation animation for loading/processing states.
visualForm: Centered layout: animated loading spinner (62x62px) at top, description text (25px) below spinner, black background
descriptionKo: 50프레임 회전 애니메이션(파란색, 62x62px)을 가진 로딩 스피너 위젯입니다. 스피너 아래 선택적 설명 텍스트(25px)를 표시하며, 로딩/처리 중 상태에서 지속 회전합니다.
descriptionEn: Loading spinner widget with rotating 50-frame animation (blue spinner, 62x62px). Optional description text below spinner (25px). Spinner positioned at top-center area, label below. Continuous rotation animation for loading/processing states.
